impact: Poor model performance and inaccurate outcomes
mitigation_strategy: Perform early data audits and implement robust data governance

risk_challenge: Difficulty integrating AI with legacy systems
impact: Delays in deployment and operational disruptions
mitigation_strategy: Plan integration roadmap and use APIs/middleware

impact: Overreliance on external vendors and slow progress
mitigation_strategy: Provide staff training and hire specialized talent
Strong change management and early engagement

risk_challenge: Risks of biased models or data privacy violations
mitigation_strategy: Involve legal early and implement fairness checks
Set realistic budget and build in contingency funds
Align expectations and show quick wins

risk_challenge: AI models lose accuracy over time
mitigation_strategy: Regular retraining cycles and monitoring dashboards

risk_challenge: AI models targeted by adversarial attacks
mitigation_strategy: Adopt AI security best practices and penetration testing

risk_challenge: Overdependence on a specific AI platform
impact: Flexibility loss and future switching costs
mitigation_strategy: Favor open standards and negotiate flexible vendor terms
